  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    palm                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    palm/synce-sync-engine Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
                           pkg-plist.plugin 
  Log:
  SynCE is a project for connecting to devices running Windows CE or Pocket PC.
  SyncEngine talks the to a Windows Mobile device through the ActiveSync
  protocol.
  
  WWW: http://www.synce.org/moin/
  
  PR:             ports/127811
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
